name: Name Game Herb Garden (Kh)
recipeIngredient: Seeds of your favorite herbs (chives are best for this)
recipeInstructions:
1. Instead of planting herbs in a flower pot, try sowing the seeds in an aluminum sheet cake pan (approximately 13" x 9" x 2") with special drainage holes punched in the bottom.
2. Fill the tray with potting soil.
3. Trace your name on the surface of the soil using your finger, making the letters large, about 4 to 6 inches tall.
4. Plant your seeds along the traced row you made with your finger.
5. Gently push the seeds into the soil and place the tray in a warm, dry spot, such as a window sill.
6. Water daily, placing old newspaper under the tray to absorb any water running off.
7. Soon tiny sprouts will appear through the soil in the shape of your name.
8. When the herbs are 3 to 5 inches tall, you're ready to present the whole tray at your next party, allowing guests to help themselves to fresh herbs in your honor.
